title: shaliysh #7991
definition:
1) third part
    1a) name of a measure
 2) a musical instrument
    2a) maybe three-stringed, triangular shape, or three-barred
    2b) perhaps a sistrum or triangle
 3) shield carrier, adjutant, officer, captain
nasbUsage:
